junior_dev_01.name: Junior Dev Alex
junior_dev_01.dialogBefore:
Hey! I just learned about gems!
Let me show you my setup!
junior_dev_01.dialogAfter:
Wow, your gems are way more
optimized than mine...

mid_dev_01.name: Developer Blake
mid_dev_01.dialogBefore:
I've been refactoring all day.
Bring it on!

mid_dev_02.name: Developer Casey
mid_dev_02.dialogBefore:
My test suite has 100% coverage!
Can your gems keep up?

mid_dev_03.name: Developer Dana
mid_dev_03.dialogBefore:
Performance is everything.
Let me show you speed!
mid_dev_03.dialogAfter: I need to optimize my approach...

senior_dev_01.name: Senior Dev Ellis
senior_dev_01.dialogBefore:
I've reviewed thousands of PRs.
Your code won't pass my review!
senior_dev_01.dialogAfter: Clean code. I'll approve this PR.

senior_dev_02.name: Senior Dev Frankie
senior_dev_02.dialogBefore:
Full-stack means I have gems
for every situation!

senior_dev_03.name: Senior Dev Gray
senior_dev_03.dialogBefore:
The legacy codebase has taught me
things you can't learn in bootcamp.
